message: Hey Rahat. It's great to see you again.  How has your semester been going?

It has had its up and downs.  I was too optimistic and thought that I wouldn’t need extra supports in my first year.  I thought that I had been doing well enough in high school that postsecondary would be the same.  That turned out not to be true.

The assignments were a much different from high school.  There was a lot more writing than I was used to – essays and stuff. Instructors don’t give you a lot of help.  They mark a lot harder and they don’t allow rewrites.
Unfortunately, instructors don’t have the time to let everyone re-do their assignments if they don’t get a good grade the first time.
Oh, I’m sorry, Rahat, this is %player%. I’m doing a mentoring session like you and I did last year.
Hi %player%. Nice to meet you. Sorry for interrupting.
